# Kernal Automation - SI Dept.

> Professional PLC training kits and control cabinets for schools, labs, and enterprise training centers. Siemens S7-1200, Mitsubishi FX5U, and Allen-Bradley Micro850 platforms.

## About

Kernal Automation Co., Ltd. - System Integration Department sells pre-wired, ready-to-use PLC training kits with complete documentation, wiring diagrams, and training videos. We ship to 15+ countries via DHL/FedEx (5-7 days express). All kits include a 1-year warranty.

Contact: Peggy Chan - peggy@kernal-automation.com | WhatsApp: +86 176 1205 1841

## Products

### Siemens S7-1200 Training Kits

- [Siemens S7-1200 + V20 VFD Training Kit](https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/siemens-s7-1200-vfd-training-kit/): $1,152.77
- [S7-1200 Communication Training Kit](https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/s7-1200-communication-training-kit/): From $1,631.30
- [S7-1211C Temperature PID Kit](https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/s7-1211c-temperature-pid-kit/): $639.48
- [S7-1215C 2-Axis Motion Kit](https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/s7-1215c-2-axis-motion-kit/): $1,180
- [S7-1200 Pneumatic Control System](https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/s7-1200-pneumatic-control-system/): From $1,178.55

## Services

- PLC Programming Service (Siemens TIA Portal, Mitsubishi GX Works, HMI design)
- Automation Software Sales (licensed Siemens, Mitsubishi software)
- Custom Kit Design (curriculum-matched, component customization, bulk orders)
